category_sources: source_facts.description says astronomical data manipulation and analysis utilities and libraries; official GNU page says Gnuastro manipulates and analyzes astronomical data.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page title and manual identify GNU Astronomy Utilities and the Gnuastro short name.
docs_sources: Official GNU Astronomy Utilities manual index at https://www.gnu.org/software/gnuastro/manual/.
repo_sources: Official GNU Astronomy Utilities page lists Git clone URL https://git.sv.gnu.org/r/gnuastro.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official GNU page identify astronomy data-analysis CLI tools and libraries.
